languages.text: "Пусть лучше провидение пошлет нам горячую ванну и сносный обед. Давайте покончим с этим поскорее".

traits.locale_text: "Пусть лучше провидение пошлет нам горячую ванну и сносный обед. Давайте покончим с этим поскорее".

languages.text: "Perhaps providence can send us a hot bath and a half-decent dinner. Let's get this over with as quickly as possible."
languages.original_text: "Пусть лучше провидение пошлет нам горячую ванну и сносный обед. Давайте покончим с этим поскорее".

traits.locale_text: "Perhaps providence can send us a hot bath and a half-decent dinner. Let's get this over with as quickly as possible."
"Perhaps providence can send us a hot bath and a half-decent dinner. Let's get this over with as quickly as possible."
"Perhaps providence can send us a hot bath and a half-decent dinner. Let's get this over with as quickly as possible."

languages.text: “但愿命运能给我们准备个热水澡，再来顿像样的晚餐。速战速决吧。”
languages.original_text: "Perhaps providence can send us a hot bath and a half-decent dinner. Let's get this over with as quickly as possible."

traits.locale_text: “但愿命运能给我们准备个热水澡，再来顿像样的晚餐。速战速决吧。”

languages.text: « Peut-être la providence nous fera-t-elle aussi la grâce d'un bain chaud et d'un repas à peu près mangeable. Finissons-en au plus vite. »
languages.original_text: "Perhaps providence can send us a hot bath and a half-decent dinner. Let's get this over with as quickly as possible."

traits.locale_text: « Peut-être la providence nous fera-t-elle aussi la grâce d'un bain chaud et d'un repas à peu près mangeable. Finissons-en au plus vite. »

languages.text: "Belki de takdiriilahi bize sıcak bir banyo ve fena sayılmayacak bir akşam yemeği bahşeder. Şu işi bir an önce bitirelim."
languages.original_text: "Perhaps providence can send us a hot bath and a half-decent dinner. Let's get this over with as quickly as possible."

traits.locale_text: "Belki de takdiriilahi bize sıcak bir banyo ve fena sayılmayacak bir akşam yemeği bahşeder. Şu işi bir an önce bitirelim."

languages.text: «Tal vez la providencia nos proporcione un baño caliente y una cena medio decente. Acabemos con esto tan rápido como sea posible».
languages.original_text: "Perhaps providence can send us a hot bath and a half-decent dinner. Let's get this over with as quickly as possible."

traits.locale_text: «Tal vez la providencia nos proporcione un baño caliente y una cena medio decente. Acabemos con esto tan rápido como sea posible».

languages.text: "Vielleicht kann uns die Vorsehung ja ein heißes Bad und ein halbwegs ordentliches Abendessen schicken. Bringen wir das hier so schnell wie möglich hinter uns."
languages.original_text: "Perhaps providence can send us a hot bath and a half-decent dinner. Let's get this over with as quickly as possible."

traits.locale_text: "Vielleicht kann uns die Vorsehung ja ein heißes Bad und ein halbwegs ordentliches Abendessen schicken. Bringen wir das hier so schnell wie möglich hinter uns."

languages.text: 「もしかしたら、神様は、僕たちに温かいお風呂と、そこそこ美味しい夕食をくれるかもしれない。できるだけ早くこの仕事を終わらせよう。」
languages.original_text: "Perhaps providence can send us a hot bath and a half-decent dinner. Let's get this over with as quickly as possible."

traits.locale_text: 「もしかしたら、神様は、僕たちに温かいお風呂と、そこそこ美味しい夕食をくれるかもしれない。できるだけ早くこの仕事を終わらせよう。」
